whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.text1: MiKiwi is an innovative e-commerce platform specialized in personalized sexual wellness. We were born with the vision of transforming the industry by offering fully customizable on-demand products, eliminating the limitations of traditional generic catalogs.
whoWeAre.text2: As a tech startup, we combine innovation, design, and a deep ethical commitment to create unique experiences that perfectly adapt to each person's individual needs.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: Democratize sexual fulfillment by offering every individual the possibility to co-create unique pleasure tools, personalized on-demand, with an unwavering commitment to inclusion, safety, and discretion.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be the global benchmark for personalized sexual wellness, eliminating standardization and normalizing self-exploration as an essential component of holistic health. We aspire to be the platform that transforms taboo into technology, and uncertainty into trust.

inclusion.title: Inclusion
inclusion.text: We guarantee that the pursuit of pleasure is accessible and respectful for all bodies and all identities, including the LGTBQ+ community.

trust.title: Trust and Ethics
trust.text: We maintain an absolute commitment to customer discretion and product safety, using only certified materials.

wellness.title: Fulfillment and Wellness
wellness.text: We promote sexuality as a fundamental pillar of holistic health and encourage positive self-exploration.

innovation.title: Technological Innovation
innovation.text: We use cutting-edge solutions, such as on-demand co-creation, to solve real consumer problems.

valueProposition.title: Our Value Proposition
valueProposition.intro: MiKiwi solves the main consumer friction in the sector: uncertainty. Through our innovative on-demand configurator, we eliminate doubts about fit, material, and product functionality.

customization.title: Total Customization:
customization.text: Design your product according to your anatomical, functional, and aesthetic needs.

quality.title: Premium Quality:
quality.text: Certified materials and high-value manufacturing processes.

experience.title: Unique Experience:
experience.text: Advanced technology for a smooth and secure shopping experience.

contact.title: Have a question?
contact.text: We're here to help. Don't hesitate to contact us.

footer.address: Pago Valdeconejos, s/n, 11550 Chipiona, Cádiz, Spain
